violations.text: At the time of inspection, leftover shellfish from a weekend event were observed stored without tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty, maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Invoice viewed at the time of inspection. PIC to request for copies of shellstock tags from the provider. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Sliced Cheese and Tomato Sauce were observed held at 55 and 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The refrigerator in the basement kitchen area was observed not maintaining proper ambient temperature for cold holding of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods. Use of the unit for cold storage of TCS Foods is to be discontinued until serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the basement kitchen refrigerator and the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Equipment is to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

The basement area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen/warewashing area was observed to have several items in it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The door to the outside, located in the downstairs kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The floors and walls in the warewashing and food prep room of the basement were observed to have an accumulation of cobwebs, leaves, soil residue/debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
